/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libwater_transport.dylib -install_name @rpath/libwater_transport.dylib CMakeFiles/water_transport.dir/water_transport_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/water_transport.dir/water_transport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/water_transport.dir/Users/slava/QT_PRoj/oop_4/transport.cpp.o -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
